reasoning: Order #000000563 is marked Complete with item shipped and paid in full, but no tracking or delivery confirmation details are visible in the order view. The customer claims the carrier shows 'delivered' but the package was not received. This scenario typically requires a carrier investigation (lost/misdelivered package) before issuing a refund. To meet SLA while protecting against incorrect refunds, escalate to shipping/carrier investigation and customer support follow-up. No refund has been issued yet and total refunded is $0.00.
